summary: First-finish smoke test for Estúdio Química study platform. All core backend endpoints and frontend flows verified end-to-end: topics listing (5 topics), content, exercises with MCQ answering + auto-grading + explanations, videos (iframes), AI summary via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), revision, progress with session persistence.
passed: GET /api/topics returns 5 seeded topics (3 Cinética + 2 Eletroquímica)
GET /api/topics/{id}/exercises returns 4 exercises for first topic (15 MCQ elements visible on UI)
GET /api/topics/{id}/videos returns YouTube videos; frontend renders iframes
POST /api/exercises/answer returns correct/wrong + correct_index + explanation (tested correct and wrong pick, UI shows feedback+explanation)
POST /api/topics/{id}/summary/generate returns Claude-generated markdown (verified via curl on Eletroquímica topic and UI showed cached summary for Cinética)
GET /api/progress/{sid} returns total/correct/accuracy/per_topic; UI progress page renders with progress bars
Home page loads with hero + topics grid; nav-topics/nav-progress work; topic-card click navigates to /topico/:id with 4 tabs (Conteúdo/Resumo IA/Exercícios/Vídeos)
Revision page loads and shows MCQ questions
Session persistence via localStorage session_id works (progress accumulated across pages)

failed.issue: First curl to POST /api/topics/{id}/summary/generate returned 'litellm.BadRequestError: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. Subsequent calls (via UI and curl on a different topic) succeeded and returned proper markdown. Likely transient LLM proxy budget state during first cold call.
failed.evidence: curl response: {"detail":"Falha ao gerar resumo: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"}. Later request on topic 745b74f9 succeeded with full markdown.

action_items: Monitor EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget error – if it recurs, investigate whether it's a rate limit / cold start issue in the litellm proxy. No code change needed if it's transient.
